name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments.

name: OPQ32 (Occupational Personality Questionnaire)
description: Provides a clear, simple framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw inferences and understand the relationships between various concepts.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided.

name: Coding Simulator
description: Evaluates candidate's coding skills in multiple programming languages.

name: Contact Center Simulation
description: Assesses an individual's ability to handle customer service scenarios effectively.
